asan.evidence_summary: UBSan reported signed integer overflow on 2147483647 + 1 at wire_format_lite.h:1148, followed by protobuf aborting on the repeated-field non-negative size check.

lldb.evidence_summary: Runtime evidence from the debug PoC showed initial_size=2147483647 and a resulting new_size of -2147483648 reaching RepeatedField::ResizeImpl().

fresh.evidence_summary: Independent review found unchecked signed arithmetic in old_entries + new_entries on both resize and reserve paths.

impact.evidence_summary: Public MergeFrom* APIs can be driven into process termination, but only when the destination repeated field is already near INT_MAX elements.

notes: All validators support the same root cause: unchecked signed addition of existing and incoming packed fixed-field element counts. Impact is limited to denial of service because the trigger requires an already huge destination message.
